generator_commands: cargo run --locked --offline --manifest-path npa-core/Cargo.toml -p npa-cli -- package lock write --root npa-project-iut/proofs --json
check_commands: cargo run --locked --offline --manifest-path npa-core/Cargo.toml -p npa-cli -- package check-generated --root npa-project-iut/proofs --json
